description: Self-healing rules for Phase 16 orchestration. Config-driven — no hardcoded values in code.

validation_error.description: Input validation failures are not recoverable — the caller must fix the request.

contract_mismatch.description: Response shape violations indicate a server-side bug. Halt and alert.

dependency_failure.description: Dependency (bridge/LLM) may recover. Retry with exponential backoff, then fallback.

timeout.description: Timeouts may be transient. Retry twice before giving up.

rate_limited_expected.description: Rate limiting is expected; backoff with exponential delay.

sse_race_condition.description: SSE disconnects before first event are non-blocking — client reconnects.

server_error.description: Server 500s indicate a code bug. Do not retry — it will just fail again.

not_found.description: Resource does not exist. No recovery possible.

conflict.description: State conflict (e.g. duplicate pipeline). Caller must resolve.

sandbox_violation.description: Security policy violation. Always halt and log for audit.
